text.title: Compute Substrate Decision Tree Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Compute Substrate Decision Tree methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: gather-workload-spec
step.action: Extract latency target, request profile, state requirements, ops constraints from ADR draft + SLO doc.
step.decision-gate: If latency target missing, STOP and request it.

step.name: score-rubric
step.action: Score each candidate (VM / container / serverless) across cost / ops-load / portability / cold-start tolerance axes per the rubric.
step.decision-gate: If two candidates tie within 10%, escalate to a tie-break review.

step.name: synthesize-decision-record
step.action: Compose the decision record naming chosen substrate, runner-up, named owner, version, last_reviewed.
